hooks.text: Everyone tells you cards never work for Chinese suppliers. They are right most of the time. But there are exactly three times they work better than a bank transfer.
There are only three moments when paying a Chinese supplier by card is the smart move. Outside those three, it quietly costs you.
Alibaba caps card payments at 12,000 dollars per order. That number is not random. It is the exact line where samples end and real production begins.
A business owner kept getting his card declined by every factory he messaged. Then one supplier accepted it instantly. The difference was one word in the listing.
Pay the wrong order by card and you eat a 3 percent fee for nothing. Pay the right one another way and you lose your only chance to claw the money back.
